import org.slf4j.Logger;

// Pin (e): only error/warn are capture levels. info/debug carry the caught but
// are not a capture - the error is not reported, only traced.
class Slf4jLevels {
    private final Logger log;

    Slf4jLevels(Logger log) {
        this.log = log;
    }

    void infoIsNotCapture() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.info("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void debugIsNotCapture() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.debug("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
